sections.paragraph:
a root not used in Kal. In the signification of to search (see Piel) it answers to the Arab. بحث, Ch. בִּחַשׁ to inquire into, to examine, kindred to which is חָפַשׂ. Its primary power appears to be that of touching, feeling, Syriac ܒܚܳܫܐܳ a touching; compare גָּשַׁשׁ to feel; קָשַׁשׁ to search for, as done by touching.

Piel בִּקֵּשׁ-

(1) to Seek for. Const. absol. 2Ki 2:17 with an acc. of pers. and thing, Gen 37:15, 16 Gen 37:16 1Sa 10:14 followed by לְ, to search into any thing, Job 10:6 different from this is Gen 43:30, וַיְבַקֵּשׁ לִבְכֹּות “he sought for a place of weeping,” he sought where he might weep. There is sometimes added a dative of benefit לֹו, 1Sa 28:7 Lam 1:19, with which addition it has also the sense of to choose (fich etwas ausfuchen), to seek for oneself, 1Sa 13:14 Isa 40:20 comp. Eze 22:30. Specially-(a) to seek the king’s face, i.e. to go to the king, to wish to go to him, 1Ki 10:24 especially to make a petition, Pro 29:26.-(b) to seek the face of God, pr. to go to God, especially with prayers, 2Sa 12:16 Psa 24:6 27:8 105:3 to inquire at an oracle, 2Sa 21:1 to appease him, Hos 5:15. Id. is-(c) בִּקֵּשׁ אֶת־יְהֹוָה Exo 33:7 2Ch 20:4. Opp. to מָצָא to be heard by God, Deu 4:29 Isa 65:1. מְבַקְשֵׁי יְהֹוָה the worshippers of Jehovah, Psa 40:17 69:7 105:3 Isa 51:1. Comp. דָּרַשׁ.

(2) to seek, to strive after, to try to get, e.g. the office of priest, Num 16:10 lying, Psa 4:3 love, Pro 17:9. Rarely followed by לְ, Pro 18:1 בִּקֵּשׁ נֶפֶשׁ פ׳ to lay snares for any one’s life, Exo 4:19 1Sa 20:1 22:23 23:15 2Sa 4:8 16:11 once in a good sense, to take pains for preserving any one’s life, Pro 29:10 (compare דָּרַשׁ לְנֶפֶשׁ Psa 142:5). בִּקֵּשׁ רָעַת פ׳ to seek or plan any one’s evil or destruction; 1Sa 24:10 Psa 71:13, 24 Psa 71:24בִּקֵּשׁ רָעָה אֶל id.; 1Sa 25:26. Followed by a gerund, to seek to do any thing, e.g. 1Sa 19:2, מְבַקֵּשׁ שָׁאוּל אָבִי לַהֲמִיתֶךָ “Saul, my father seeketh to kill thee;” Exo 2:15 4:24 with an inf. Jer 26:21.

(3) to require, to demand, Neh 5:18 followed by מִן Psa 104:21 מִיַּד Gen 31:39 43:9 Isa 1:12. Specially בִּקֵּשׁ דַּם פ׳ מִיַּד פ׳ to require any one’s blood of any one, i.e. to exact the penalty for bloodshed; 2Sa 4:11 Eze 3:18, 20 Eze 3:20 33:8 and without דָּם 1Sa 20:16.

(4) to ask, to seek from any one, followed by מִן of pers., Ezr 8:21 Dan 1:8, and acc. of thing, Est: 2:15 also followed by עַל to entreat, to supplicate for any one, Est 4:8 7:7 .

(5) to ask, to inquire of anyone, to interrogate, followed by מִן Dan 1:20.

Pual, to be sought, Eze 26:21 Jer 50:20 Est 2:23. Hence-
